---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new index mode, kernel, or API
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem / motivation**
What are you trying to do that ordvec doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
(See [docs/ALTERNATIVES_CONSIDERED.md](https://github.com/Project-Navi/ordvec/blob/main/docs/ALTERNATIVES_CONSIDERED.md) —
some directions were already trialled and dropped.)

**Scope**
Does this touch the no-system-dependencies guarantee, the MSRV, or a
persistence format?
